title: cathayeia polycarpa
intro: Cathayeia polycarpa, also known as Taiwan Storax or Chinese Storax, is a plant species native to Taiwan and parts of China. It is a type of tree sap that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cathayeia polycarpa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Cathayeia polycarpa can be prepared as an essential oil, salve, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
